title: FormatString<{maxLength: 5}>
description: JSON + binary (de)serialization of FormatString<{maxLength: 5}> (string branded with a length cap); the maxLength brand constrains validation only — both formats serialize the plain underlying string.
notes: The maxLength brand never reaches the wire: serialization uses the base string kind, so the value round-trips as a plain variable-length string in JSON and binary (no fixed byte size).
